title: Karnataka HC upholds ‘leave India’ notice to French national who was operating restaurant while on tourist visa
content: French national Christophe Stephane Monxion had been regularly going back to his country for short periods and returning to India on a new tourist visa each time while operating a restaurant in Gokarna

title: M.K. Stalin resigns as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister; Governor accepts his resignation
content: “The Governor has requested him [Mr. Stalin] to continue in office until alternate arrangements are made,” a statement from the Lok Bhavan said.

title: Assembly election 2026 results LIVE: Tamil Nadu Congress offers conditional support to Vijay's TVK
content: The Tamil Nadu Congress Committee extended its support to the TVK, but said that the TVK shouldn't seek the support of the lone winner from the BJP in the State, or any alliance partners of the BJP

title: Congress offers conditional support to TVK in Tamil Nadu
content: TNCC says TVK, which emerged as the single-largest party, should not seek support from BJP or its alliance partners; Vijay likely to meet the Governor on May 6 to stake claim to form govt or seek time

title: Tiruchi orthography researchers decipher ancient inscription in Courtallam hill cave
content: After two-and-a-half years of research, K. Balakrishnan and Mathur B. Pavendan have deciphered an inscription in Sanyasi Pudavu in Courtallam hills in Tenkasi district

title: U.P. man jailed over ‘I love Muhammad’ post secures bail
content: The court noted that the applicant ‘does not have any criminal antecedents’ and the post ‘does not name any particular caste or community’

title: Dutch warship De Ruyter visits Kochi port
content: The ship’s crew members to engage in joint training exercises with the Indian Navy to strengthen operational ties

title: The highest and lowest margins of victory in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election
content: Most constituencies with margins above 60,000 votes were won by the TVK, with the DMK finishing second in a majority of these seats. The distribution of these margins shows a concentration in urban and industrial regions

title: Congress slams the government over ‘sluggish’ private investment, cites Chief Economic Adviser’s comment
content: Congress general secretary in-charge communications Jairam Ramesh said that for some time now, his party has been drawing attention to a fundamental problem preventing the economy from achieving higher real GDP growth rates

title: Union Cabinet raises sugarcane FRP by ₹10 per quintal
content: The government said that with a view to protect the interests of sugarcane farmers, it has also decided that there shall not be any deduction in case of sugar mills where recovery is below 9.5%

title: BJP gears up to pick Bengal CM; Suvendu Adhikari front runner
content: Swearing-in of the new Cabinet is likely to take place on May 9, the birth anniversary of Rabindranath Tagore

title: Omar, Mehbooba question ECI’s role in West Bengal polls
content: The role of the EC played a significant part in the results besides other factors, says NC leader; PDP chief alleges “electoral manipulation” in West Bengal

title: Mann meets Murmu, seeks nixing of Rajya Sabha membership of seven MPs who quit AAP
content: His visit came after Raghav Chadha, one of the seven MPs who defected, met the President and submitted a representation alleging that the ruling party in Punjab is resorting to ‘vendetta politics’

title: Child among two missing after boat capsizes in Rajasthan
content: Preliminary investigation suggested that overloading might have caused the accident; the boat was being operated by a local and the occupants had no life jackets

title: Manipur’s Zomi leaders to take late BJP MLA Valte’s body to Delhi, protest outside party office
content: Valte was assaulted by an Imphal mob on May 4, 2023, suffering life-threatening injuries; after his death in February 2026, his family refused to perform his last rites till the arrest of those behind the attack

title: Put petty politics aside, says Rahul Gandhi, as he backs Mamata Banerjee
content: The Congress leader describes the BJP’s victory in West Bengal and Assam Assembly elections as a “theft” of the popular mandate

title: Stalin accorded rousing reception in Kolathur
content: The DMK president met and thanked supporters. Voters recalled his contributions to the constituency, including the construction of flyovers, community halls, and other facilities

title: CIC recommends DoPT include sub-caste data in UPSC results to broaden reach of affirmative action
content: The DoPT official added that the list of candidates allocated to services (along with their category) on the basis of CSE-2017 onwards is available on the department's portal

title: ‘In learning organisations, failure is not a bad word’
content: Experts say organisations that create opportunities for employees to improve and excel through upskilling or reskilling often reap the benefits in the long run

title: Consider Teesta water sharing deal under ‘current circumstances’: Bangladesh FM post BJP’s Bengal win
content: Mamata percieved as hurdle in Teesta talks; ahead of Beijing trip, Bangladesh FM says, “Of course, Teesta will be discussed with China”; Dhaka demands greater share of Teesta waters

title: Bombay High Court grants bail to Surendra Gadling in prison since 2018 in Elgar Parishad case
content: The lawyer-activist, the last among the 16 accused in the 2017 case, will continue to be behind bars as his bail application in a separate 2016 arson case is pending before Supreme Court

title: MoD inks ₹1,476 crore deal with BEL for mobile electronic systems
content: According to Defence Ministry, the systems, with a minimum indigenous content of 72%, are expected to significantly enhance the operational capabilities of Army units while advancing India’s self-reliance in defence manufacturing.

title: Medical negligence claims can be pursued against a deceased doctor’s heirs, says SC
content: The Bench says heirs are not personally liable, but compensation can be paid from the deceased doctor’s estate

title: Christians increasingly under attack in Odisha, claim activists
content: Attacks have been reported on Christian places of worship, forceful disruption and closure of prayer meetings, and instituting false charges of unlawful religious conversion on the clergy, says the People’s Tribunal

title: Motorists demand NHAI to re-lay pot-holed service lane on Vellore - Ranipet border
content: The service lane has remained unrepaired for months even after the opening of a new underpass in February; NHAI cites the delay to the rising cost of bitumen due to fluctuations in global market

title: Will strengthen INDIA bloc, says Mamata after Bengal election debacle
content: For the first time, Mamata Banerjee has spoken about strengthening the Opposition alliance; the statement is significant as it comes after her defeat in the West Bengal Assembly election

title: PM Modi ‘strongly’ condemns attacks on oil hub, expresses ‘firm solidarity’ with UAE
content: External Affairs Ministry issues statement calling the attack “unacceptable” and says the “targeting of civilian infrastructure and innocent civilians” must end; PM Modi to visit UAE on May 15

title: "Improved Me Quite A Bit": Giorgia Meloni Calls Out Viral Fake Lingerie Photo
content: On Tuesday, the Italian premier posted the altered image on her Facebook page to expose it, alongside a screenshot of a user identified as "Roberto", who had reshared it with the claim that she should be "ashamed".

title: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 Highlights: Vijay To Resign From Trichy East, MK Stalin's Resignation Accepted
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: While most exit polls have predicted DMK's second straight win, one suggested a huge wave of the "Vijay effect" in the state this time.

title: "Backstabbers": Ally DMK On Congress's Possible Tie-Up With Actor Vijay
content: The five seats the Congress got in this election was because the party aligned with the DMK. "Otherwise, they would have drawn a blank at the recent polls," he said.

title: Delhi Child Dies After Falling Into Open Drain, Junior Engineer Sacked
content: Expressing deep sorrow over the tragic death, Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta said that the incident was "extremely distressing and alarming".

title: Japan Receives First Russian Oil Shipment Since Iran War
content: Japan, which depends on the Middle East for around 95 per cent of its oil imports, has tried to diversify its sources of energy since the war began.

title: Parked Scooter Explodes Near Jalandhar Border Force Base
content: The sound of the blast was so intense that it was heard up to a kilometre away, causing alarm among nearby residents and passersby.

title: "Wave White Flag Of Surrender": Trump Says Iran Military "Totally Gone"
content: Trump told reporters in the Oval Office that Iran's military has been reduced to firing "peashooters" and that Tehran privately wants to make a deal

title: Tamil Nadu Election Hinged On Close Contests And Razor-Thin Margins
content: In its very first assembly election, the TVK emerged as the single-largest party, securing 108 of the 234 seats

title: Trump Says He Works Out "One Minute A Day" As He Restores Fitness Award
content: US President Donald Trump said Tuesday his exercise routine lasts at most a minute a day, as he signed an order to bring back a presidential fitness award for children.

title: Man Created Ex-Lover's Tinder Profile, Asked Men To Rape Her. 18 Turned Up
content: After a nine-day trial at Chester Crown Court, Asad Hussain, 36, was found guilty of stalking and is due to be sentenced in June.

title: With Little Footfall, Madhya Pradesh Metro Hosts Weddings, Birthdays
content: The new programme comes on the backdrop of an operational challenge, with metro services in Bhopal and Indore struggling with poor passenger turnout.

title: 'This Election Has Sent Tremors Through Entire Political Landscape': Vijay
content: Making its electoral debut, the actor-turned-politician's party shocked the DMK and AIADMK and secured 108 of 234 seats.

title: Trump Congratulated PM Modi On "Historic, Decisive" Election Win: Report
content: "The President congratulates Prime Minister Modi on this recent, historic, and decisive election victory," White House spokesman Kush Desai told IANS.

title: Cabinet Approves 3 Railway Projects Worth Rs 23,437 Crore Across 6 States
content: New Delhi, May 5 (IANS) The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs (CCEA), chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, on Tuesday approved three railway projects worth Rs 23,437 crore across Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Karnataka, Andhra Pra

title: "Robber Bride" Looted Eight Husbands. 9th Marriage Caused Her Downfall
content: The exploits of the 'robber bride', who had already been married eight times previously, came to light when she made a man from Beed's Umapur village her ninth victim.

title: 'Opportunity To Fix Economic Gap': Sanjeev Sanyal On BJP's Bengal Win
content: Sanyal pointed out that the state, once a major economic hub, has seen a long-term decline in its economic share.

title: 'Anga, Banga, Kalinga': BJP completes eastern arc with Bengal victory
content: The BJP has achieved a significant milestone by securing a victory in West Bengal in 2026, completing its symbolic arc across eastern India with control in Bihar, Bengal, and Odisha. This win consolidates a long-standing political project, marking a sharp turnaround for the party after a Lok Sabha setback and expanding its national reach.

title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp’s AI playbook for US firms: What to do and avoid
content: Palantir CEO Alex Karp urges AI companies to abandon "AI slop" and focus on functional software services, citing the company's significant growth driven by demand for its platform. He contrasts Palantir's "actual results" rooted in data with low-quality AI content, emphasizing the platform's impact on essential infrastructure and the battlefield.

title: CSK's disciplined bowling and Samson’s unbeaten 87 brush aside DC
content: Delhi Capitals’s home struggles continued as they managed only 155/7 against Chennai Super Kings, who chased the target comfortably thanks to Sanju Samson’s unbeaten 87. CSK’s disciplined bowling, led by Akeal Hosein, exposed DC’s batting issues again. Poor performances from KL Rahul, Axar Patel and Kuldeep Yadav pushed Delhi closer to elimination.

title: After OpenAI raised over $4bn; Anthropic announces partnership with Blackstone & others
content: AI giants OpenAI and Anthropic are intensifying their competition by launching new ventures aimed at boosting enterprise AI adoption. Both companies have secured significant funding from major financial institutions to help businesses integrate their AI tools into daily operations. This strategic move prioritizes real-world usage and revenue growth as both firms reportedly explore public listings.

title: SIR, yes SIR: How voter deletions impacted West Bengal elections
content: West Bengal witnessed a significant political shift as the BJP formed its first government, largely influenced by the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls. This exercise, which removed nearly 12% of voters, disproportionately affected minority communities and became a central, contentious issue, reshaping voting trends and contributing to the BJP's surge across the state.

title: Horoscope Today: Daily astrological predictions for May 6
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for May 6, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong in layoff email to employees: I have watched engineers use AI tools
content: Coinbase is cutting about 14% of its global workforce, impacting around 700 jobs. This move is driven by the evolving role of artificial intelligence in operations and ongoing crypto market fluctuations. The company aims to streamline its structure and enhance efficiency. Restructuring is expected to conclude by the second quarter of 2026.

title: 'Mujhe laga achha score hai': Axar says set batters made difference after DC loss
content: On whether 155 was a competitive total, Axar said, "Yes obviously. The wicket the way played in the first innings, we felt that 155 was a really good score on the board. But I felt that we played with 8 batters, so we were 10-15 runs short."

title: Marcellus Wiley faces new allegations after hotel incident claim
content: Marcellus Wiley is facing four new sexual assault allegations, including one from a former ESPN co-worker and another involving claims of grooming a minor. The accusations, reported by Rolling Stone and Awful Announcing, add to earlier cases from 2023. Wiley has denied past claims but has not responded to the latest ones. The case is ongoing.

title: Florida mom arrested after rant, accused of kicking child at youth game
content: Renee Lambert was arrested in Fort Myers after she allegedly kicked a child during a youth football game at Brooks Park. Police say she entered a player fight and later argued with officers during arrest. She faces child abuse and resisting charges. Authorities found no proof of her claim that a child hit her first. Court date is June 1.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Tennessee Titans, Dallas Cowboys eye Joey Bosa move
content: Veteran defensive end Joey Bosa remains a free agent, with the Tennessee Titans and Dallas Cowboys emerging as top contenders. While Dallas eyes Bosa to bolster a struggling pass rush, the Titans see him as a perfect fit, citing cap space, a potential connection through coach Robert Saleh, and a need for proven edge talent to complement their young roster.

title: More students, more colleges, too few teachers: Inside India’s higher education crisis
content: India’s higher education expansion looks impressive on paper: more students, more colleges, more seats. But behind the growth story sits a stubborn faculty shortage that exposes a deeper fault line. Recruitment delays, state-level bottlenecks, contractual hiring and weak academic infrastructure are leaving classrooms overcrowded and teachers stretched, raising a sharper question: Is access expanding faster than education itself?

title: TVK's Vijay to take oath as CM on May 7 - short of majority, how will he form govt?
content: TVK chief Vijay will be sworn in as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister on May 7, securing 108 seats. Despite falling short of a majority, the party plans to seek support from smaller allies to form the government. Vijay has received congratulations from Rahul Gandhi and Prime Minister Narendra Modi, expressing commitment to public welfare and state progress.

title: Jordan Kyrou trade rumors: Oilers linked after Blues struggles
content: A significant offseason transfer that the Edmonton Oilers may consider undertaking following another disastrous playoff performance includes St. Louis Blues forward Jordan Kyrou. As trade rumor columns keep revisiting the possibility of matching the talented winger with Edmonton due to the fact that scoring depth issues in the team are a concern. The recent slump in production by Kyrou and the offensive needs by Edmonton might result in one of the biggest NHL narratives of the offseason.

title: Mukesh Khanna urged to reconsider Ranveer Singh as Shaktimaan
content: Veteran actor Surendra Pal reminisced about his strong bond with Mukesh Khanna, praising his natural acting talent and passion. Pal revealed he actively pursued the role of Tamraj Kilvish in Shaktimaan, undergoing significant physical transformation. He dismissed rumors of a rift, citing health reasons for leaving the character, and emphasized their mutual respect and dedication.

title: Warner questions PSL 'Team of the Year' selections as Babar Azam named captain
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) announced the team on Monday. Babar Azam was named captain after leading Peshawar Zalmi to the title and performing well with the bat.

title: Veteran producer RB Choudhary dies in crash; Rajinikanth mourns loss
content: Veteran film producer RB Choudary has died in a fatal car crash near Udaipur on Tuesday. Reports suggest the accident took place around 3 pm. The exact cause of the crash and the condition of others involved are yet to be confirmed. Condolences have begun pouring in from across the film fraternity. Superstar Rajinikanth also mourned his demise.

title: How India-New Zealand FTA creates new global pathways for Indian talent
content: The India-New Zealand FTA highlights that the provisions on student mobility, professional pathways, working holiday visa creates an unprecedented opportunity for Indian youth and professionals to gain global exposure.

title: Why was the West Bengal verdict set in stone?
content: What began in 2011 as a movement against the Left Front’s stagnation had, by 2026, come full circle. Mamata Banerjee had once represented disruption and hope. Over time, her regime became associated with a different vocabulary. Words like “cut money”, “syndicate control”, and “tolabazi” became shorthand for everyday governance failures. This was not merely opposition rhetoric, it was a lived experience. From construction projects to small household repairs, local syndicates were perceived to control economic activity.

title: Travis Kelce plans comeback after Raiders beat Chiefs, with Mahomes factor
content: Travis Kelce will play for the Kansas City Chiefs for three more seasons. This decision shocked everyone who thought he would retire. Travis Kelce informed head coach Andy Reid and general manager Brett Veach of his decision after the team’s final game against the Las Vegas Raiders. He wants to support quarterback Patrick Mahomes during his ACL recovery. He values friendship above everything.

title: Centre bolsters Supreme Court: Strength of judges increased from 33 to 37
content: The PM Modi-chaired Cabinet meeting approved the proposal for introducing The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026 in Parliament to amend The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956 for increasing the number. The Constitution leaves the size of the Supreme Court open-ended. Article 124(1) provides for a Chief Justice of India and permits Parliament to determine the number of other judges through legislation.

title: T20 success not enough for 'respect': Manjrekar sets challenge for Sooryavanshi
content: His performances have led to discussions about whether he could be selected for the India team after the IPL, and Manjrekar said he has done enough to be considered.

title: Carlsen suffers first classical chess loss since table-slam outburst vs Gukesh
content: World No. 1 and five-time world  Magnus Carlsen suffered his first classical chess defeat in nearly a year after losing to Jorden van Foreest at the TePe Sigeman & Co Tournament 2026 in Malmo. Carlsen had remained unbeaten since his loss to D Gukesh in 2025. Arjun Erigaisi stayed unbeaten after drawing with Nodirbek Abdusattorov.

title: 7 silent warning signs that may mean you need a Cerebral Angiography
content: Subtle symptoms like sudden headaches or vision blur could signal serious brain vascular issues. Cerebral angiography, a specialized imaging test, maps brain blood flow, acting as the gold standard for diagnosing conditions like stroke and aneurysms. This vital procedure can even offer real-time treatment, underscoring the importance of heeding warning signs for timely intervention and brain health protection.

title: Trisha’s old ‘CM’ remark resurfaces after Vijay’s big win
content: Actress Trisha Krishnan's old interview clip has resurfaced and is trending online. In the 2004 video, she jokingly spoke about becoming a chief minister. This has sparked nostalgia and amusement among fans, especially after Thalapathy Vijay's recent election victory. The clip highlights Trisha's early career charm. Meanwhile, Trisha is awaiting the release of her upcoming film 'Karuppu' with Suriya.

title: Rohit's injury absence cost MI, says Harbhajan after win over LSG
content: Harbhajan Singh said Rohit Sharma’s earlier return from injury could have improved Mumbai Indians’ IPL 2026 campaign. Rohit’s match-winning knock against Lucknow Super Giants highlighted his importance to the side. Harbhajan felt MI lost crucial matches during Rohit’s absence but believes the team still has an outside chance of reaching the playoffs.

title: IPL 2026: Why the mighty Mumbai Indians are in desperate need of an overhaul
content: Wholesome changes are needed at the Mumbai Indians after yet another underwhelming IPL season. It's high time the management makes the tough calls on players whose personal interests and ambition do not contribute to the team's cause. The next mega auction is an opportunity for the franchise to fix the mistakes made at the auction table, but the immediate need is to set the house in order and restore normalcy in the dressing room.

title: Blockbuster debut! Vijay Tamil Nadu's Gen-nayagan
content: Tamil Nadu's political landscape is witnessing the rise of a new superstar in actor Vijay, mirroring MGR's trajectory. Despite a contrasting on-screen persona, Vijay's unconventional campaign, leveraging social media and a direct voter appeal, has positioned him as a formidable force. He has emerged from the shadows of established parties, capturing public imagination and potentially reshaping the state's political future.

title: Highly qualified, not dependent: HC denies maintenance to wife with Rs 31 lakh income
content: The dispute arose from matrimonial proceedings between two highly qualified medical professionals. The wife, a practicing gynaecologist with an M.D. degree, challenged a trial court order which had partly rejected her application for maintenance under Sections 24 and 26 of the Hindu Marriage Act, 1955.

title: ‘You’re one of the OGs’: Virat Kohli’s heartfelt tribute for RCB stalwart - Watch
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru bid an emotional farewell to former head physio Evan Speechly after his 18-year association with the franchise.  Virat Kohli and Director of Cricket Mo Bobat led tributes, highlighting Speechly's professionalism, kindness, and dedication. Speechly expressed his gratitude, calling RCB family and feeling fortunate for his long tenure.

title: West Bengal election: The 'sun sets' for Mamata Banerjee
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party has achieved a historic victory in West Bengal, securing a landslide win and ending Mamata Banerjee's 15-year reign. The BJP claimed every seat in nine districts, including Purba Medinipur and the northern hills, signaling a significant shift in the state's political landscape. This triumph marks the BJP's first time in power in West Bengal.

title: 'Smoke from bag, power bank on fire': Indigo flight evacuated at Chandigarh airport
content: smoke from a bag was detected when the aircraft had come to a halt and passengers were yet to disembark . the airline then decided to carry out immediate evacuation using emergency slides . everyone on board is learnt to be safe .

title: Mamata Banerjee refuses to resign, rejects poll defeat - what happens now?
content: Mamata banerjee says she will not be resigning . she alleges irregularities and signalling a multi-pronged political and legal response . a day after the sweeping victory in west Bengal, she refused to accept the verdict as a reflection of public mandate .

title: How split in minority votes helped BJP breach TMC bastions
content: the 2026 assembly elections have redrawn west Bengal's political fate in saffron . the BJP didn’t just win, they swept the state clean . but beyond the blockbuster headline numbers, real political plot twist lies in where some of its most stunning breakthroughs came from .

title: Oxford’s Bodleian Libraries sends sacred Hindu text Shikshapatri on UK tour
content: the scripture provides moral and spiritual guidance for everyday life in 212 Sanskrit verses . the manuscript is one of the oldest known copies written by the author himself . it will next be on loan at Shree Swaminarayan Temple, Stanmore, from may 13 .

title: ‘Tap water samples found to be contaminated with E. coli in Palluruthy’
content:
The recent hepatitis A cases reported in Palluruthy have been attributed to contamination in the water supplied through the Kerala Water Authority’s (KWA) network.

Three water samples obtained from the house taps of infected persons revealed the presence of E. coli bacteria, said health officials.

title: NC will hand over Kargil council reins to Congress, Farooq Abdullah says after ‘feud’
content: farooq Abdullah says his party will hand over chairmanship of ladakh autonomous hill development council-Kargil (LAHDC-K) over to congress . the allies had emerged as the single largest party in the Oct 2023 elections with 12 seats in the union territory .
